text:
Once upon a time in a small town named Evergreen, there lived a curious pup named Benny. Benny loved exploring every nook and cranny of the town, from the cozy corners filled with vintage books to the sparkling lakes where ducks quacked merrily. His favorite part was the old abandoned library, a pile of books taller than him. Every evening, Benny would spend hours there, curling up and letting the pages guide his imagination.

One particularly sunny afternoon, while Benny was browsing through an ancient tome about the folklore of Evergreen, a peculiar symbol—a spiral hourglass—caught his eye. Intrigued, he nestled it into the crook of his neck and set off for home.

Benny had set off for a picnic with his best friends—the wise owl, Mr. Hoot, and the sneaky squirrel, Toby. As they wandered through the woods, Toby couldn't resist the pull of curiosity any longer. “Guys,” he whispered, “I found something
